scripts.smoke:api: node -e "const base=process.env.MINI_DROP_BASE_URL||'http://127.0.0.1:8787'; const paths=['/api/health','/api/tasks','/api/processes']; const run=async()=>{for(const p of paths){const res=await fetch(base+p); if(!res.ok){throw new Error(`${p} -> ${res.status}`);} console.log(`${p} ok`);} }; run().catch((error)=>{console.error(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.smoke:create-task: node -e "const base=process.env.MINI_DROP_BASE_URL||'http://127.0.0.1:8787'; const payload={target:'smoke@local',language:'Python',collector:'py-spy',scenario:'python_hot_loop'}; const run=async()=>{const res=await fetch(base+'/api/tasks',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)}); if(!res.ok){throw new Error(`/api/tasks -> ${res.status}`);} const body=await res.json(); console.log(body.task?.id||'created');}; run().catch((error)=>{console.error(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.smoke:repeat-task: node -e "const base=process.env.MINI_DROP_BASE_URL||'http://127.0.0.1:8787'; const repeat=Math.max(2, Number(process.env.MINI_DROP_REPEAT_COUNT||2)); const run=async()=>{for(let index=0; index<repeat; index+=1){const payload={target:`repeat-smoke-${index}@local`,language:'Python',collector:'py-spy',scenario:'python_hot_loop'}; const res=await fetch(base+'/api/tasks',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)}); if(!res.ok){throw new Error(`/api/tasks -> ${res.status}`);} const body=await res.json(); console.log(body.task?.id||`created-${index}`);} }; run().catch((error)=>{console.error(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.validate:local: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
